title: message_query hard-coded sort order not surfaced in type signature
description: message_query always sends sort:[{property:sentAt, isAscending:false}] in the wire request, but MessageQueryInput has no sort field. Callers cannot opt into ascending order, and the return type QueryResponse does not record applied sort. When Phase 4 adds pagination or a UI needs chronological order, adding a sort parameter will be a breaking API change. Callers that already depend on the implicit descending order have no way to express that dependency, so the breakage will be silent.
